name: Orange Poppyseed Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a screw-top jar.
2. Toast the poppy seeds for about 5 minutes at 350°F (175°C) until slightly golden.
3. Shake vigorously to mix.
4. Chill until serving.
5. Serve over a salad of Boston lettuce with melon and chopped prosciutto, or use it as a complement to any green salad, adding small chunks of cantelope, honeydew, or star fruit for enhanced flavor. It can also be served over slices of cold roast pork with nectarine wedges on watercress.
